agent_submissions.notes: Pilot agent 1 for Creator Growth Systems. Focus on repeated domain loops, not generic tooling.

agent_brief.focus: Recurring creator growth, packaging, monetization, repurposing, and audience-building loops.
agent_brief.distribution_lens: Prefer domains that ambitious online people would use, share, debate, or brag about on X.
candidate_requirements: Return 1-3 candidate domain chips only
Every candidate must describe a repeated specialization loop
Every candidate must describe a repeated mastery loop
Prefer domains with talkability, social spread, or obvious creator / builder pull
Reject personas, generic features, and vague workflow ideas

raw_candidates.label: Creator Idea Sprint Loop
raw_candidates.description: A rapid loop for turning creator signals into fresh post, clip, or product concepts before momentum fades.
raw_candidates.specialization_surface: running the repeated creator idea sprint loop workflow inside the creator growth systems wedge
raw_candidates.mastery_surface: learning which inputs, timing, and execution patterns make Creator Idea Sprint Loop outperform generic or manual approaches for this audience over repeated cycles
raw_candidates.user_value_loop: review the next live signal, draft the next creator idea sprint loop move, execute it, measure the response, and update the working playbook for the next cycle
raw_candidates.evidence_summary: Creators on X and short-form platforms keep needing new angles faster than their manual ideation process can sustain.
raw_candidates.raw_observation: Creators on X and short-form platforms keep needing new angles faster than their manual ideation process can sustain.
